title: Exit Liquidity Ep 43 - All the alpha on HyperLend
summary_title: HyperLend's 500M TVL credit layer and the future of on-chain finance
summary_description: Ness breaks down HyperLend's lending protocol, portfolio margin integration, HPL tokenomics, and why institutions need compliant credit markets on Hyperliquid.

key_moments.label: HyperLend mission: all-in-one credit layer on Hyperliquid
Private credit markets for SEC-compliant institutions launching soon
Hyperliquid's 50M policy center lobbying for US perp approval
Portfolio margin live; HyperLend offers broader collateral for LSTs
HPL genesis: 33% circulating, staking and fee discounts planned
Liquidation guard feature: auto-repay to prevent liquidations
Vision: HyperLend as JP Morgan for decentralized credit markets
Three audits completed; no vulnerabilities found in core protocol

pull_quote: If Hyperliquid wants to really house all finance, we can be JP Morgan to the stock exchange for credit.
